T0156.title: Guaranteed Real, Not Guaranteed Complete
T0156.definition: In illicit data trading, a transaction term used by illegal data lookup services to guarantee the authenticity of the data while disclaiming any responsibility for its completeness. It serves as a liability waiver for the seller.
